zh: 公元前354年 · 齐魏争霸
魏赵边境 · 大梁—邯郸战区

en: Deploy — Position troops, plant spies, set decoys
zh: 布阵 — 部署兵力、安插细作、布置疑兵

en: Strategize — Issue orders, move troops, execute stratagems
zh: 运筹 — 下达军令、调兵遣将、施计用间

en: Resolve — Heaven calculates, blades clash, supply lines contend
zh: 决胜 — 天机演算、兵锋交加、粮道争锋

en: Aftermath — Tally the score, mandate shifts, history inscribes
zh: 论功 — 清算战果、天命流转、史笔如铁

en: Right-click unit for menu | 1-4 toggle map modes
zh: 右键部队开菜单 | 1-4 切换地图模式

en: Click a unit on the map to inspect
zh: 点击地图部队查看详情

en: Right-click a unit for command menu
zh: 右键部队打开命令菜单

zh: 部署疑兵（isFake单位）以迷惑魏军：

Select an allied unit to act:
zh: 选择己方部队后可执行：
军令已毕，进入决胜阶段

en: The battle is over. History records.

zh: 🎭 【疑兵】部署 {name}，在敌看来似有 {size} 之众！

en: 💥 [EXPOSED] Decoy discovered by {enemy} — straw dummies destroyed!
zh: 💥 【识破】疑兵被{enemy}抵近识破，草人虚旗尽毁！

en: 📉 [SUPPLY CUT] {name} supply severed! Morale plummets to {morale} — {state}
zh: 📉 【断粮】{name} 补给线断绝！士气暴跌至 {morale}，{state}
📈 【补给】{name} 粮道畅通，士气恢复至 {morale}

en: 💀 [ROUTED] {name} morale collapsed — troops flee in panic!
zh: 💀 【溃散】{name} 士气崩溃，士卒四散奔逃！

en: [Turn {turn}] Allied: {alliedCount} units, {alliedSize} men | Enemy: {hostileCount} units, {hostileSize} men | Cuts: {cutEdges} | Decoys: {fakeUnits}
zh: 【第{turn}回合结算】 友军: {alliedCount}部 {alliedSize}人 | 敌军: {hostileCount}部 {hostileSize}人 | 断粮: {cutEdges}道 | 疑兵: {fakeUnits}支
【系统】场景「{name}」载入完毕。共 {count} 支部队待命。

en: ⚔️ {defender} attacks {attacker} — the camp is empty! Wasted effort!
zh: ⚔️ {defender}攻击{attacker}——发现营寨空虚无兵，白费力气！

en: ⚔️ {attacker} raids {defender} — straw men and painted flags collapse! A decoy!
zh: ⚔️ {attacker}突袭{defender}——草人虚旗应声而倒，此乃疑兵空营！

en: Avoid the sharp edge. +25% combat power
Do not obstruct retreating troops. -30% combat power
zh: 归师勿遏。士气瓦解，战力-30%

en: S — Whole Victory: Subdue the enemy without fighting
zh: 全胜 — 不战而屈人之兵，善之善者也

en: A — Decisive Victory: Know the enemy and know yourself
zh: 大捷 — 知彼知己，百战不殆

en: B — Minor Victory: Victory can be known but not made
zh: 小胜 — 胜可知而不可为

en: C — Pyrrhic Victory: Kill one thousand, lose eight hundred
zh: 惨胜 — 杀敌一千，自损八百

en: D — Defeat: Know neither enemy nor self
zh: 败军 — 不知彼不知己，每战必殆

en: F — Annihilation: A fallen kingdom cannot be restored
zh: 覆军 — 亡国不可以复存，死者不可以复生

en: To fight and conquer in all your battles is not supreme excellence; supreme excellence consists in breaking the enemy's resistance without fighting.
zh: 不战而屈人之兵，善之善者也。故上兵伐谋，其次伐交，其次伐兵，其下攻城。

en: If you know the enemy and know yourself, you need not fear the result of a hundred battles.
zh: 知彼知己者，百战不殆。故善战者，立于不败之地，而不失敌之败也。

en: What the ancients called a clever fighter is one who not only wins, but excels in winning with ease.
zh: 胜可知而不可为。不可胜者，守也；可胜者，攻也。

en: There is no instance of a country having benefited from prolonged warfare.
zh: 杀敌一千，自损八百。故兵贵胜，不贵久。

en: No ruler should put troops into the field merely to gratify his own spleen; no general should fight a battle simply out of pique.
zh: 不知彼不知己，每战必殆。主不可以怒而兴师，将不可以愠而致战。

en: A kingdom that has once been destroyed can never come again into being; nor can the dead ever be brought back to life.
zh: 亡国不可以复存，死者不可以复生。故明君慎之，良将警之。

en: Engage the enemy with the orthodox, but secure victory with the unorthodox.
zh: 以正合，以奇胜。故善出奇者，无穷如天地，不竭如江河。

en: There are five ways of attacking with fire: burn soldiers, burn stores, burn baggage, burn arsenals, and use incendiary missiles.
zh: 凡火攻有五：一曰火人，二曰火积，三曰火辎，四曰火库，五曰火队。

en: Knowledge of the enemy's dispositions can only be obtained from other men.
zh: 凡用兵之法，必先知敌之细作。五间俱起，莫知其道。

en: Control the goods of the realm and seize the profits of the empire.
zh: 通天下之货，夺天下之利。治私盐重税之务，以实国课。

en: Sun Tzu — Feudal Grand Strategy Sandbox

zh: 历史阵营霸权沙盒推演与实时军情网络

"War is of vital importance to the State. It is a matter of life and death, a road either to safety or to ruin."
zh: "兵者，国之大事也。死生之地，存亡之道，不可不察也。"
